nasb.text: Everyone who is proud in heart is an abomination to the Lord; Assuredly, he will not be unpunished.

esv.text: Everyone who is arrogant in heart is an abomination to the Lord; be assured, he will not go unpunished.

cnv.text: 心裡驕傲的人都是耶和華厭惡的； 他們必不免受罰。

ccb.text: 耶和华厌恶心骄气傲者， 他们必逃不过祂的责罚。

csbs.text: 所有心里高慢的，都为耶和华所憎恶； 他们必然难逃罪责。
